name: Xero
description: Access Xero accounting data including invoices, contacts, bank transactions, and financial reports through AI chat.

oauth_config.scopes: openid profile email accounting.transactions accounting.contacts accounting.settings accounting.reports.read

setup_notes:
Requires Xero OAuth 2.0 credentials. This is the official Xero MCP server.

Admin setup:
1. Go to https://developer.xero.com/app/manage and sign in
2. Create a new app (select 'Custom connection' type for server-to-server access)
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
4. For custom connections, follow the guide at https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/custom-connections/
5. Enter the Client ID and Client Secret in the server configuration

Authentication modes:
- **Custom Connection** (recommended for org-level): Uses Client ID + Client Secret for direct server-to-server access to a single Xero organization
- **Bearer Token**: Set XERO_CLIENT_BEARER_TOKEN instead if you have a pre-obtained token

The custom connection type is ideal for this use case as it provides persistent access without user-interactive OAuth flows.
